lines.speaker: Carlos
lines.instructions: Speak in a warm, confident, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Hoy resumimos un tema concreto con ejemplos claros para empezar rapido.

lines.speaker: Lucia
lines.instructions: Speak in a bright, friendly, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Vale, bajemos eso a un caso diario: donde se atasca primero el equipo.

lines.speaker: Carlos
lines.instructions: Speak in a warm, confident, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Incluimos una mini lista de pasos para aplicar desde hoy.

lines.speaker: Lucia
lines.instructions: Speak in a bright, friendly, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Entonces la mejora buena es la que reduce friccion sin ocultar el criterio.

lines.speaker: Carlos
lines.instructions: Speak in a warm, confident, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: La senal buena es que el equipo aplica el cambio sin pedir una guia aparte.

lines.speaker: Lucia
lines.instructions: Speak in a bright, friendly, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Y si eso no pasa, el supuesto ahorro era solo aparente.
